title: cannot delete graphs anymore
description:
hello there,
Using virtuoso 7 OSE.
I hope someone can help.
I followed the recommendation from Performance Tuning Virtuoso for RDF Queries and Other Use for the situation where one has a huge amount of graphs:
DROP INDEX RDF_QUAD_GS;
CREATE COLUMN INDEX  RDF_QUAD_GPSO
   ON RDF_QUAD (G, P, S, O)
   PARTITION (S INT (0hexffff00);
It seemed to work fine. Performances were improved.
But now I can't drop graphs anymore:
SPARQL CLEAR GRAPH <...> results in:

Error 42000: [Virtuoso Driver][Virtuoso Server]SR...: No index RDF_QUAD_GS for single key delete

Am I suppose to change the way I delete graphs?
Any suggestion?
thanks
poc: CREATE COLUMN INDEX RDF_QUAD_GPSO ON RDF_QUAD (G, P, S, O) PARTITION (S INT (0hexffff00));
SPARQL SELECT ?g (COUNT(*) AS ?cnt) WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?s ?p ?o } } GROUP BY ?g ORDER BY DESC(?cnt);
key_bug_features: Cannot delete graphs after modifying RDF_QUAD index
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_graphs (id INT PRIMARY KEY, graph_uri VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_graphs WHERE graph_uri IS NOT NULL;
